description: Style Note Beautifully stitched patterns and delicate design detail set these kurtas from folklore aside. Use of bright colours, complementing designs and the ability to retain a quality of elegance in the attire is what makes this perfect traditional wear to work or for functions. Pair them with well fitted leggings and ethnic sandals for a look that will impress.  Product Details Lavender printed kurta, has a mandarin collar with a split V neckline, panel and tape detail on the yoke, three quarter sleeves and a red panel and embroidery above the hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach Use warm iron do not iron on the print or embroidery Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style NoteBeautifully stitched patterns and delicate design detail set these kurtas from Folklore aside.
